page_title: Santorini — Aegean Dreams | Alpen Glow Tours and Travels
title: Santorini — Aegean Dreams
overview_paragraphs: Santorini's whitewashed villages cascading down a volcanic caldera are the single most photographed view in Greece, and seeing it in person still manages to exceed the pictures. This trip is built around the island's famous sunset, its black- and red-sand beaches, and a day sailing the caldera that produced the whole dramatic landscape.
Best for couples and honeymooners, or anyone wanting a few days of pure, unhurried island time.
inclusions: Wine tasting at a local vineyard
